## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.13.11

### Camera Recordings
- Adds an X-Sense Recordings sidebar panel for browsing camera SD-card recordings inside Home Assistant.
- Keeps camera recording playback cache-backed, with on-demand playback and optional background sync.
- Immediately downloads new motion-event clips before firing notification-ready events.
- Opens recording notification taps in the X-Sense Recordings sidebar viewer and attaches cached recording media to mobile notifications.
- Adds debug timing for the event-to-cache-to-notification path so logs show queue, cache, and total elapsed milliseconds.

### Fixes
- Prevents the integration options screen from failing when old prerelease option values are still saved.
- Keeps fresh motion-event recording clips visible before the normal recording-history refresh catches up.
- Improves debug logging for recording panel data, playback, thumbnails, sync-waiting cases, and notification timing.

### Validation
- Adds coverage for sidebar panel registration, panel API routes, recording deep links, cached playback, thumbnail handling, and event clip merging.
- Confirms the camera stream implementation files remain unchanged.
